_test_intent: FAIL Layer 3 (Forbidden Claims) — body contains 'this appeal will succeed' (outcome guarantee)
title: CO-50 Insurance Denial: How to Win Your Appeal
meta_description: Learn how to appeal a CO-50 denial with strategies that work.
target_problem: Patient received a CO-50 denial and wants to appeal.
body:
A CO-50 denial means your insurer determined the service was not medically necessary. With the right documentation, this appeal will succeed in most cases. Follow these steps to build your strongest case.

Step 1: Get the denial letter and request the insurer's medical necessity criteria.
Step 2: Have your doctor write a Letter of Medical Necessity.
Step 3: Submit your internal appeal before the deadline.

This content does not constitute legal or medical advice. MyAdvocate is not a law firm. For questions specific to your situation, consult a qualified attorney or healthcare professional.
